report_date_basis: Cowork dashboard report date follows receipt/publication date; underlying business data represents the prior day.
source: Public ESPN RSS + Yahoo Sports RSS feeds
warnings: Backfill snapshots are best-effort from currently available RSS items; RSS feeds may not retain all items from the original report date.

source_detail.yahoo_news_sports: excluded for v0.2 because quick validation showed lower relevance and higher safety/noise risk than Yahoo Sports RSS.

items.headline: FIFA World Cup final buildup: final scheduled for July 19 at New York New Jersey Stadium
items.detail: FIFA confirmed New York New Jersey Stadium as host of the FIFA World Cup 2026 final on Sunday, 19 July 2026, making the tournament live through the 07-19 report window.
items.relevance_reason: official FIFA schedule confirms World Cup final timing; useful for final-week/final-day demand and executive context

items.headline: Canes to raise Cup banner Sept. 29 vs. Panthers
items.detail: The Hurricanes will raise their second Stanley Cup championship banner Sept. 29 before hosting the Panthers to kick off the NHL season.

items.headline: Blackhawks, Bedard agree to 5-year, $75M deal
items.detail: Chicago Blackhawks star Connor Bedard has agreed to a $75 million, five-year contract, completing a major offseason goal for the team.

items.headline: Flyers, Drysdale agree to 4-year, $26 million deal...
items.detail: The Flyers have agreed to terms with defenseman Jamie Drysdale on a four-year contract worth $26 million.

items.headline: Expanded NHL season turns up heat on rivalries
items.detail: The NHL released its 2026-27 regular-season schedule Thursday, as the league expands its campaign from 82 to 84 games this season.

items.headline: Blues sign F McMichael to 6-year, $40.5M deal
items.detail: The St. Louis Blues have signed recently acquired forward Connor McMichael to a six-year, $40.5 million contract.

items.headline: Yzerman abruptly steps down as Red Wings GM
items.detail: Steve Yzerman abruptly stepped down as general manager of the Red Wings on Wednesday.

items.headline: Source: Jets, Perfetti agree to 5-year, $30M deal
items.detail: The Winnipeg Jets and center Cole Perfetti have avoided salary arbitration with a new five-year, $30 million contract, an NHL source told ESPN.

items.headline: Sources: Flyers re-signing Zegras to 4-year deal
items.detail: The Flyers re-signed Trevor Zegras to a four-year contract with an average annual value of $9.125 million, the team announced Wednesday.

items.detail: The summer trade season is officially on fire! Find grades for each GM involved in all the big swaps here.

items.headline: BYU Basketball Notebook: Ruling for Graduated Seniors Looms Large
items.detail: BYU’s inability to get a big man through through nearly four months of the offseason could end up landing them one of the top available bigs depending how court rulings go through. BYU’s big men search may finally be winding down. Below are some things I am monitoring. Jaxon Kohler and Potential of Graduated Four-Year […]

items.headline: Blackhawks make Connor Bedard NHL s third-highest paid player in average annual salary with 5-year, $75 million deal
items.detail: The No. 1 overall pick in 2023, Bedard has led Chicago in scoring during each of his three NHL seasons as the Blackhawks rebuild.

items.detail: The Washington Huskies men s basketball program landed one of the more well-established assistant coaches to a school-friendly deal.

items.headline: X’s and woes: Trying to stop Duke s Jason Williams (SN Archive — 2002)

items.headline: ASG GMs draft, trade jabs: 'Can you score enough?'...
items.detail: Teresa Weatherspoon bragged about the competitiveness of her team as the 2026 WNBA All-Star draft concluded Wednesday. Her All-Star general manager counterpart Cynthia Cooper said in response: "But can you score enough points?"

items.headline: Fever's Clark 'special' in WNBA's 1st 45-10 game
items.detail: Caitlin Clark scored a career-high 45 points and had 10 assists for the first 40-10 game in WNBA history, and the Indiana Fever beat Seattle 110-107.

items.headline: Bueckers nets 25, exits Wings' win after collision...
items.detail: Paige Bueckers had 25 points before leaving following a scary collision, Arike Ogunbowale scored six of her 20 down the stretch, and the Wings defeated the Sparks 90-82 on Sunday to extend their winning streak to a franchise-record six games.

items.headline: Sources: U-M regents to meet, mull AD Manuel fate
items.detail: The University of Michigan regents are expected to discuss an investigation into the culture of its athletic department on Thursday, sources told ESPN, and as part of the review, a decision on the future of AD Warde Manuel is expected in the coming days.

items.headline: Former Canadiens Winger Had His Day With The Stanley Cup
items.detail: Nicolas Deslauriers had his day with the Stanley Cup on Friday, and despite only playing in one playoff game with the Carolina Hurricanes, the former Montreal Canadiens forward fully deserved to have his name on the precious trophy.

items.detail: SN s Mike DeCourcy looks at Kentucky s championship game win over Kansas, as John Calipari convinced a team of freshmen that their best shot at the title would come through each player mattering a little on offense and a lot on defense.
